title: Project Lightwell brings open source security into the AI era
summary: Project Lightwell is IBM and Red Hat's $5 billion initiative to strengthen open source security by deploying AI-augmented engineers and building a trusted security clearinghouse. The project aims to secure the open source ecosystem from within, given that open source powers over 90% of Fortune 500 companies while also powering growing cyberattacks.
